## THE HEIGHT OF ELEGANCE

[![100 Las Olas](https://lasolasonehundred.com/wp-content/uploads/2019/02/Logo_main.jpg)](https://lasolasonehundred.com/)

Soaring above vibrant downtown Fort Lauderdale, 100 Las Olas will be the cityРђЎs tallest building:

46 levels, 113 luxury residences, 238 hotel guest rooms, fine dining and select retail space.

Iconic architecture, designed with a contemporary aesthetic, incorporates curved geometric shapes
clad in steel and glass creating the feeling of complete transparency and light transmission.

Designed for modern luxury living by Bob Martin of The Decorators Unlimited, the residences at 100 Las Olas feature contemporary open great room plans, gourmet kitchens ideal for entertaining, and expansive terraces with glass railings designed to provide unobstructed long-range views of the Fort Lauderdale skyline.

Come home and unwind at the height of elegance; a unique address planned for the way sophistication is meant to be lived.

![](https://lasolasonehundred.com/#)

## About

## 100 Las Olas

_100 Las Olas: Fort LauderdaleРђЎs tallest condominium, and home to a world-class luxury condo-hotel in the heart of Downtown_

100 Las Olas is Fort LauderdaleРђЎs first new condo addition in over a decade. Designed to be the tallest in Fort Lauderdale, this ultra-luxury condo-hotel soars 499 feet above ground with 46 levels. While levels 8-15 are dedicated to Hyatt CentricРђЎs 238 hotel rooms, levels 16-46 house the 113 private condo residences.

This glass and steel structure comes designed by the illustrious SB Architects. Its common areas have been conceptualized by the Chicago-based, nationally acclaimed Simeone Deary Design Group. And, its residences feature designs by Palm BeachРђЎs renowned Bob Martin of The Decorators Unlimited.

Each of the contemporary residences in 100 Las Olas offers expansive and open floor plans. The gourmet kitchens are outfitted with European-style cabinetry and appliances. And, the expansive terraces feature glass railings to provide unobstructed views of Fort LauderdaleРђЎs enigmatic cityscape and skyline. Highlight amenities at this iconic condo-hotel include a rooftop resort-style pool with cabanas, a fine-dining restaurant and bar with indoor-outdoor seating, residentsРђЎ club room and entertainment areas.

Situated in Fort LauderdaleРђЎs active Downtown, this mammoth structure sits in the best part of town. The NSU Art Museum, Bubier Park, Riverwalk, Publix Greenwise Market and Nat Geo Fine Art Gallery are all within walking distance. Residents can also enjoy a short drive to the Museum of Discovery and Science or the Broward Center for the Performing Arts. And for travel, the Fort Lauderdale-Hollywood International Airport is just a 20-minute drive.

100 Las Olas Residence Features:
